title: Natreom's Ambient Structures
body:
Natreom's Ambient Structures is a world generation mod for Forge 1.20.1 designed to generate structures that add to the environment of your Minecraft world. These structures fit great for players who don't want their worlds to feel lonely or empty. Enjoy!

All current structures were built by anonymous players from a Beta 1.7.3 server world download shared by Izenthyr:
https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/world-of-naught-mc-beta-server-world/

Currently, this mod is available for Forge 1.20.1. The future of this mod is ideally to turn it into a datapack once I figure out how to do so.
